name: indian_visa
title: Indian eVisa Form Walkthrough
description: Fill the Indian eVisa application start form with safe dummy data and stop before captcha submission.
prompt: Open indianvisaonline.gov.in eVisa form, enter fake applicant details, and stop safely at captcha.

steps.caption: Step 1: Open the Indian eVisa portal home page
steps.description: Open the Indian eVisa portal home page
steps.narration: Here is the opening move. Let's start by opening the Indian eVisa portal home page. Now the workflow has a stage.

steps.caption: Step 2: Open the eVisa application form start page
steps.description: Open the eVisa application form start page
steps.narration: On the next screen, the process stays easy to follow. We open the eVisa application form start page.

steps.caption: Step 3: Select nationality and passport type for the applicant
steps.description: Select nationality and passport type for the applicant
steps.narration: We continue carefully from here. We select nationality and passport type for the applicant.

steps.caption: Step 4: Choose the port of arrival for the application
steps.description: Choose the port of arrival for the application
steps.narration: Next, we keep the flow clear. We choose the port of arrival for the application. Keeping the choice visible is what makes the flow teachable.

steps.caption: Step 5: Fill date of birth and email confirmation
steps.description: Fill date of birth and email confirmation
steps.narration: Now we move one step further. We fill date of birth and email confirmation.

steps.caption: Step 6: Choose visa service: eTourist Visa (30 Days)
steps.description: Choose visa service: eTourist Visa (30 Days)
steps.narration: On the next screen, the process stays easy to follow. We choose visa service. Keeping the choice visible is what makes the flow teachable.

steps.caption: Step 7: Set expected date of arrival and acknowledge instructions
steps.description: Set expected date of arrival and acknowledge instructions
steps.narration: We continue carefully from here. We set expected date of arrival and acknowledge instructions.

steps.caption: Step 8: Stop at captcha step for safe, non-submitting demo
steps.description: Stop at captcha step for safe, non-submitting demo
steps.narration: That lands the result. We stop at the captcha step here.
